text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make my way into the cafeteria, where I notice a
small crowd huddled around a table scattered
with coins.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Go all in, I dare ya. Let's raise the stakes and
make things more excitin'.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Eek! Run away!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch, what a shame. And after I went to all this
trouble to set this up.
choice_data_list: Don't tell me you were gambling...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hah, not exactly. Just a lil' make-believe using
chocolate coins as chips.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Casual games over candy aren't against the rules
now, are they?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know what ya thought. ...Here, pull up a
seat.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna make it up to me, humor me with a
round of poker. Five-card draw.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her gaze fiercely fixed upon me, I agree to a
match with Nakayama Festa, and so the game
begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shuffle.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, terrible poker face ya got there. I take it
you've got a good starting hand.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But does it top mine? Here, lemme give ya a
sneak peek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, Nakayama Festa starts revealing her
cards without a shred of hesitation!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Look here. I've got a three, four, five, and a six.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If my last card's a seven, that's a straight. Not too
shabby. What're you workin' with over there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look down at my three of a kind. If she's telling
the truth, she has a better hand than I do.
choice_data_list: I don't like my odds... I better fold.
She has to be bluffing... I'm all in!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch, what a killjoy. So you're the type to lie in
wait for the right opportunity, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But I have to admit, you did make the right call
this round.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She reveals her last card as she says this—a seven
of hearts. I nearly fell for her ruse!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Ya dodged a bullet there. But are ya really
content just playin' it safe? Play like you mean it.
I want somethin' high-stakes and down to the
wire.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Puttin' it all on the line and goin' all in, eh? Little
better than throwin' yourself to the wolves...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Still, true victory can only be obtained by those
willing to seize it right outta the maw of death.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, she shows me her last card—a four of
clubs. My gamble paid off!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Guess this was worthwhile, after all. To think
I'd find someone here cut from the same cloth as
me.
